nasb.text: The desolate land will be cultivated instead of being a desolation in the sight of everyone who passes by.

esv.text: And the land that was desolate shall be tilled, instead of being the desolation that it was in the sight of all who passed by.

cnv.text: 從前所有路過的人都看為荒涼之地，現在卻必再可以耕種。

ccb.text: 荒凉之地必有人耕种，路人再也看不见荒地。
